title: CoPilot Integration with ease
excerpt: We need the Copilot integration with Monday.com to be available with ease, and would love to see it launched soon. Our team is eager to use AI not just for automation, but to actively engage with our data—asking question…

posts.author: nbronson (Nancy Bronson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need the Copilot integration with Monday.com to be available with ease, and would love to see it launched soon. Our team is eager to use AI not just for automation, but to actively engage with our data—asking questions, uncovering insights, and managing our boards more intelligently.

This kind of interaction would be a game-changer for how we collaborate and work with staff across projects. If there’s an opportunity to be part of early access or testing, we’d love to be considered.

Thanks for moving this forward!

posts.author: Jacques1 (Skylar Reynolds)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @nbronson — that’s a fantastic suggestion. A CoPilot integration within monday.com would indeed transform how teams interact with their data, making project management far more intuitive. Many users share your excitement about AI-driven insights and automation. While there’s no confirmed release timeline yet, it’s worth keeping an eye on monday.com’s Apps Marketplace and Product Updates section for announcements. You can also express interest through monday’s Feature Request form or your Customer Success Manager to be considered for early testing when it becomes available.

posts.author: Jamzee (JAME)
posts.cookedHtml: yeah, fantastic suggestion if worked on, it will be the ease of time.

posts.author: WorkOSMods (O.Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree, this kind of integration would be a huge step forward.
